title: Bearish or Bullish
description: Explores the predictive capacity of Wall Street Journal language and sentiment on key market fluctuation indicators. Combines LDA topic modelling, RoBERTa sentiment analysis, and Lasso regression to forecast market movement.

title: Money is Motivation
description: Investigates whether intrateam salary dispersion predicts game-level NBA outcomes as a proxy for firm performance under varying pay distributions. Constructs per-minute salary dispersion metrics from scraped game logs and applies Random Forests to predict results.
